summary: Verified Ripple VFX About section on home page (VFX department is default). All 6 new paragraphs render with the correct content, styling (text-gray-400 on black background), scroll-animate + opacity-0 + translate-x-[-30px] classes, and IntersectionObserver-driven scroll animations trigger visible on all paragraphs as user scrolls.
passed: #about section exists and heading reads 'About Ripple VFX'
P1 starts with 'Ripple VFX was founded by Carle and Aymeric, two French artists...'
P2 contains 'Their journey began at MPC...'
P3 covers studio creation ('create something of their own')
P4 vision paragraph ('Ripple VFX was created with the vision...')
P5 mentions decade of experience / collaboration & problem-solving
P6 mission paragraph ('Their mission is to bring a fresh approach...')
All paragraphs have classes: scroll-animate, text-gray-400, opacity-0, translate-x-[-30px]
Computed color rgb(156,163,175) confirms text-gray-400 on black background
After scrolling through page, all 6 paragraphs gain 'visible' class and animate to opacity=1
